subject: RE: Permits
body:
Enclosed is a chart showing existing land use and environmental permits
which are current, pending or to be filed. I will send you the balance of
the scheduling information later today. I hope this helps. Please contact me
if you have questions. 

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Sunday, November 11, 2007 10:30 AM
To: Jpm6929@aol.com; john amerling; DKIESQ@aol.com
Subject: 

lets' please put in one document where we are.. permits issued , to come,
possible in future, I would also like to know the status of the interiors
contracts,, library office. etc.
